messages.content: 请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。“注意上述假设给出了系统参数和系统噪声协方差的约束限制，在工程实际应用中，由系统的能量约束可知该假设是正确的。下面将依据该假设，给出滤波误差协方差的递归上界。”

Please help me revise and translate the following sentence into English to conform to the language style commonly used in journals: "注意上述假设给出了系统参数和系统噪声协方差的约束限制，在工程实际应用中，由系统的能量约束可知该假设是正确的。下面将依据该假设，给出滤波误差协方差的递归上界。”

"Note that the aforementioned assumption imposes constraints on the system parameters and the covariance of system noise. In practical engineering applications, the correctness of this assumption is justified by the energy constraint of the system. Based on this assumption, we will derive the recursive upper bound for the covariance of filtering errors."
请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。“近几十年来，由于需要对实际系统中的双向传播现象进行建模，二维系统受到了越来越多的研究兴趣。”
In recent decades, there has been a growing research interest in the modeling of bidirectional propagation phenomena in practical systems, leading to increased attention on two-dimensional systems.

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。“在许多工程问题中，在二维系统框架中开发系统动力学的例子随处可见，包括但不限于实时网络可视化、批处理建模和控制以及数字信号处理\cite{12,13,14}。与传统的一维变位移系统相比，二维变位移系统依赖于两个自由方向的传播特性，这给理论分析带来了额外的动力学困难。在这种情况下，大量文献讨论了二维系统的理论分析主题，包括但不限于二维系统的状态空间表示\cite{15}、可控性与可观察性分析\cite{20}、稳定性与估计\cite{16,17,18,19}、故障诊断\cite{21,22}、模糊系统的镇定\cite{23,24}等。”

In many engineering problems, examples of developing system dynamics within a two-dimensional framework can be found, including but not limited to real-time network visualization, batch modeling and control, and digital signal processing [12, 13, 14]. In comparison to traditional one-dimensional displacement systems, two-dimensional displacement systems rely on the propagation characteristics in two independent directions, which add extra difficulties to theoretical analysis. In this regard, extensive literature has discussed various theoretical analysis topics of two-dimensional systems, including but not limited to state-space representation [15], controllability and observability analysis [20], stability and estimation [16, 17, 18, 19], fault diagnosis [21, 22], and stabilization of fuzzy systems [23, 24].

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。“随着科学技术的不断创新，传感器网络成为近年来的研究热点，并得到了广泛的应用。如何优化利用来自不同传感器的多组观测信息，通过传输网络将这些信息发送给滤波器以估计系统状态，是传感器网络系统相关的一个开放和具有挑战性的课题。由于传感器网络系统在制导与导航、空间与地面探测、通信、目标跟踪、水下机器人\cite{25,26,27}等各个领域的广泛应用，设计准确、可靠、适用于实际应用场景的估计算法已成为众多研究人员努力追求的目标。”

With continuous innovation in science and technology, sensor networks have become a research hotspot in recent years and have been widely applied. How to optimize the utilization of multiple sets of observations from different sensors, transmit this information through a network, and use it to estimate the system state with a filter is an open and challenging issue in sensor network systems. Due to the broad applications of sensor network systems in various fields such as guidance and navigation, space and ground exploration, communications, target tracking, underwater robotics [25, 26, 27], designing estimation algorithms that are accurate, reliable, and suitable for practical scenarios has become the goal pursued by many researchers.

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。"通常，希望状态和观测输出可以直接从系统方程中推导出来。不幸的是，在实际的工业系统中，系统状态和观测输出经常受到相关噪声和随机不确定性的影响。相关噪声主要包括统计性质已知的加性白噪声和被白噪声破坏的乘性色噪声。由于物理约束、环境变化、电干扰或信号衰减，这种观测中的不确定性主要包括观测退化，通常与传输介质带宽低或传感器老化传输精度不可预测的退化有关。除了传感器观测输出中的这些不确定性外，传感器通信网络传输的数据还经常受到通信带宽、通信信道不完善或网络拥塞等因素的影响。这些因素导致了数据传输过程中不可避免的随机不确定性。例如，在工业系统处理数据的过程中，如果传入的数据流量过大，网络就会变得拥塞，处理器接收到的观测数据可能会延迟;或者由于网络带宽不足，导致网络中数据传输受阻，导致传输时间延长。"

Usually, it is desirable to directly derive the system state and observation outputs from the system equations. Unfortunately, in real industrial systems, the system state and observation outputs are often affected by correlated noise and random uncertainty. Correlated noise mainly includes additive white noise with known statistical properties and multiplicative colored noise degraded by white noise. Due to physical constraints, environmental changes, electrical interference, or signal attenuation, the uncertainty in these observations primarily involves observation degradation, usually associated with unpredictable degradation of transmission accuracy due to low transmission medium bandwidth or aging of sensors. In addition to these uncertainties in sensor observation outputs, the data transmitted through sensor communication networks are also frequently influenced by factors such as communication bandwidth, imperfect communication channels, or network congestion. These factors result in inevitable random uncertainties during the data transmission process. For example, in the process of handling data in industrial systems, if the incoming data flow is too large, the network may become congested, causing delays in the observation data received by the processor. Alternatively, due to insufficient network bandwidth, data transmission in the network may be hindered, resulting in extended transmission times.

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。逻辑要通顺，可适当进行修改。“对于传感器网络环境下的状态估计问题，由于不可避免的外部扰动，系统状态和观测经常受到相关噪声和随机不确定性的影响。其中相关噪声主要包括统计性质已知的加性白噪声和时间相关的乘性观测噪声。统计性质已知的加性白噪声服从零均值的高斯分布，对其研究已有大量结果。时间相关的乘性观测噪声可表示为被白噪声破坏的线性系统模型。在一维系统中具有时间相关乘性观测噪声的滤波问题已出现许多结果。然而，对于二维系统具有时间相关乘性观测噪声的滤波问题还没有得到充分解决，尽管它非常重要。”

For the state estimation problem in sensor network environments, the system state and observations are frequently affected by correlated noise and random uncertainties, which are inevitable due to external disturbances. Among them, correlated noise mainly includes additive white noise with known statistical properties and time-correlated multiplicative observation noise. Additive white noise with known statistical properties follows a Gaussian distribution with zero mean, and extensive research has been conducted on it. Time-correlated multiplicative observation noise can be represented as a linear system model degraded by white noise. Many results have been obtained for filtering problems with time-correlated multiplicative observation noise in one-dimensional systems. However, the filtering problem for two-dimensional systems with time-correlated multiplicative observation noise has not been adequately resolved, despite its significance.

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。逻辑要通顺，可适当进行修改。“对于传感器网络环境下的状态估计问题，由于不可避免的外部扰动，系统状态和观测经常受到相关噪声和随机不确定性的影响。其中相关噪声主要包括统计性质已知的加性白噪声和时间相关的乘性观测噪声。统计性质已知的加性白噪声服从零均值的高斯分布，对其研究已有大量结果。时间相关的乘性观测噪声可表示为被白噪声破坏的线性系统模型。在一维系统中具有时间相关乘性观测噪声的滤波问题已出现许多结果。然而，对于二维系统具有时间相关乘性观测噪声的滤波问题还没有得到充分解决，尽管它非常重要。随机不确定性主要包括丢包、传输障碍和通信延迟。受物理约束、环境变化、电干扰或信号衰减影响，系统中丢包和传输障碍现象时常发生。但在传感器网络中最值得特别注意且最经常发生的是由网络带宽限制引起的通信延迟。例如，在工业系统处理数据的过程中，如果传入的数据流量过大，网络就会变得拥塞，处理器接收到的观测数据可能会延迟;或者由于网络带宽不足，导致网络中数据传输受阻，导致观测数据传输时间延长。”

For the state estimation problem in sensor network environments, the system state and observations are often influenced by correlated noise and random uncertainties due to unavoidable external disturbances. Correlated noise mainly includes additive white noise with known statistical properties and time-correlated multiplicative observation noise. Additive white noise with known statistical properties follows a Gaussian distribution with zero mean, and substantial results have been achieved in its study. Time-correlated multiplicative observation noise can be represented by a linear system model degraded by white noise. Many results on filtering problems with time-correlated multiplicative observation noise in one-dimensional systems have emerged. However, the filtering problem for two-dimensional systems with time-correlated multiplicative observation noise has not been sufficiently addressed, despite its significant importance.

Random uncertainties mainly comprise packet loss, transmission obstacles, and communication delays. Packet loss and transmission obstacles frequently occur in the system due to physical constraints, environmental changes, electrical interference, or signal attenuation. However, the most significant and frequently occurring random uncertainty in sensor networks is communication delays caused by network bandwidth limitations. For instance, in the data processing of industrial systems, if the incoming data flow is excessively high, the network may become congested, leading to delayed reception of observation data by the processor. Similarly, insufficient network bandwidth can impede data transmission in the network, resulting in prolonged observation data transmission times.

请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。逻辑要通顺，可适当进行修改。“值得注意的是，在已知延迟的情况下，通常通过状态维展开方法来解决由传感器网络延迟引起的多重观测延迟问题。但状态展开法会导致系统维数的增加和不必要的计算开销，这是我们不希望出现的。本文首次介绍用于处理二维系统中多重观测延迟问题的观测重组方法。该方法将时滞系统转化为无时滞系统，不会产生额外的计算开销，可以有效地应用于具有观测延迟的滤波问题。在许多实际系统中，测量结果可能在给定时间内被多个时间相关的乘性噪声所破坏，当模型中没有充分考虑时间相关乘性噪声的这些特性时，往往会导致较差的估计性能。据笔者所知，时间相关乘性观测噪声在二维滤波问题中相应的结果很少（如果不是没有的话），更不用说同时考虑多信道观测延迟的情况了。本文的主要目的是解决上述两个关键问题，从而促进二维滤波方案的研究。”

It is worth noting that, in the case of known delays, the state augmentation method is commonly employed to address the issue of multiple observation delays caused by sensor network delays. However, the state augmentation method increases the system dimension and incurs unnecessary computational overhead, which is undesired. This paper introduces, for the first time, the observation reassembly method for handling multiple observation delays in two-dimensional systems. This method transforms time-delay systems into non-delayed systems without introducing additional computational overhead, making it effective for filtering problems with observation delays. In many practical systems, measurement results may be disrupted by multiple time-correlated multiplicative noises within a given timeframe. When the characteristics of time-correlated multiplicative observation noise are not adequately considered in the model, this often leads to poorer estimation performance. To the best of our knowledge, there is limited (if any) corresponding research on time-correlated multiplicative observation noise in two-dimensional filtering problems, let alone considering multiple-channel observation delays simultaneously. The primary objective of this paper is to address these two key issues, thereby promoting research in two-dimensional filtering approaches.
请帮我润色修改“”里面的句子并翻译为英语，使句子符合一般期刊的语言特色。逻辑要通顺，可适当进行修改。“x表示由y所张成的线性空间。”
The variable x represents the linear space spanned by y.
